channel.title: windows, linux, i3 on Memo Garcia
channel.description: Recent content in windows, linux, i3 on Memo Garcia

item.title: i3 running on WSL2
item.description: WSL configuration Install i3 sudo apt install i3 -y Create an init script vim ~/src/scripts/i3launch.sh #!/bin/zsh source ~/.zshrc # If not running interactively, don't do anything [ -z "$PS1" ] && return export DISPLAY=$(awk '/nameserver / {print $2; exit}' /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null):0 export LIBGL_ALWAYS_INDIRECT=1 dbus_status=$(service dbus status) if [[ $dbus_status = *"is not running"* ]]; then sudo service dbus --full-restart fi i3 To run WSL2 as root
